4:
With evident pleasure, Mujih informs you that the first installment of her story will soon grace an edition of <Emphasis>The Raven</Emphasis>. As before, she will remain in Ishgard to await further instructions from Basyle.

※The next botanist quest will be available from Mujih Mewrilah upon reaching level 55.
